headline: Trump’s Anthropic shutdown just made the case for non-American AI
summary: Anthropic took its powerful AI models offline at Washington's request. The White House demanded blocking access for all foreign nationals, including its own employees. This incident highlights the growing case for non-American sovereign AI development.

headline: Google Chrome is closing the loopholes that let old ad blockers keep working
summary: Google Chrome versions 150 and 151 will end support for older ad blocker workarounds. This change targets Manifest V2 extensions, including popular ones like uBlock Origin. Users will need to adapt to newer, potentially less effective ad-blocking solutions.

headline: Big Tech’s desperate last push at AI regulation
summary: Big Tech lobbies aggressively for comprehensive federal AI regulation in Washington. Their goal is preemption: a single national law overriding a patchwork of state-level rules. This push aims to standardize AI guidelines and create a consistent regulatory environment.

headline: Xbox turmoil continues with a studio closure and executive departures
summary: Xbox is undergoing a significant 'reset' marked by expected layoffs and strategic shifts. Compulsion Games, the studio behind South of Midnight, is reportedly being shut down. Executive departures further indicate ongoing changes within the Xbox division.

headline: Today’s Top Deals: LEGO Speed Champions Movie Cars, Xbox Gift Cards, Switch 2 Cameras, and More
summary: Discover today's top discounts on popular items like LEGO Speed Champions movie cars. Grab deals on Xbox Gift Cards and various other tech accessories. Find excellent last-minute Father's Day gift ideas and more.

headline: Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer Drops to Lowest Price of the Year, Now Just $133
summary: The popular Flashforge Adventurer 5M 3D Printer is now available at its lowest price ever. Get this reliable and highly moddable 3D printer for only $133. This deal presents an excellent opportunity for enthusiasts and beginners alike.

headline: Fox Is Buying Roku for $22 Billion
summary: Fox plans to acquire the streaming platform Roku in a massive $22 billion deal. This strategic move aims to significantly boost Fox's presence in the competitive streaming market. The acquisition is set to strengthen Fox's focus on the free streaming landscape.

headline: Obsession Director Curry Barker Says He's in No Rush to Make Obsession 2
summary: Director Curry Barker confirms he has no immediate plans to develop a sequel to his hit film 'Obsession'. 'Obsession' continues its strong box office performance after five successful weekends. Barker prioritizes quality over speed for any potential follow-up.

headline: Russia was behind arson attacks targeting PM, BBC reveals
summary: BBC investigation reveals Russia orchestrated arson attacks targeting a Prime Minister. Evidence shows Russian operatives directed the plots to stoke tensions. They leveraged fake far-right and Muslim groups to carry out the attacks.

headline: Under-16s to be banned from TikTok, YouTube and other social media by next spring, Starmer says
summary: Prime Minister Starmer announces a nationwide ban on social media for under-16s. Platforms like TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram will become inaccessible to millions of children. The new policy is slated for implementation by next spring.

headline: Social media ban - bold and blunt, but no silver bullet
summary: BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman weighs in on the newly announced social media ban for young people. She describes the policy as bold and blunt, acknowledging its significant impact. However, Kleinman warns it may not be a complete solution to online issues.

headline: Teacher guilty of sexually abusing and murdering adopted baby
summary: Jamie Varley, a teacher, has been found guilty of horrific crimes. He was convicted of sexually abusing and murdering his adopted baby, Preston Davey. Preston tragically died after months of physical and sexual abuse.
